---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation
What are you trying to accomplish? Why isn't the current tool enough?

## Proposed solution
Describe the feature from a user's perspective. Include CLI flags, config
keys, or output changes if relevant.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you thought about and why they're less appealing.

## Scope
- [ ] One-shot (`fetch`)
- [ ] Continuous (`watch`)
- [ ] Storage (CSV / Excel)
- [ ] Config / CLI surface
- [ ] Other: ...

## Additional context
Screenshots, links to similar tools, or TikTok API references.
